menu_stable_shot_beta_desc:
BASIC: ##$basic;##

You gain ##$multibasic;## weapon accuracy.

ACE: ##$pro;##
You gain ##$multipro;## additional weapon accuracy.
menu_medic_2x_beta_desc:
BASIC: ##$basic;##
Your doctor bags have ##$multibasic;## more charges.

ACE: ##$pro;##
You can now deploy ##$multipro;## Doctor Bags instead of just one.
menu_ammo_2x_beta_desc:
BASIC: ##$basic;##
Each ammo bag contains ##50%## more ammunition.

ACE: ##$pro;##
You can now place ##2## ammo bags instead of just one.
menu_steady_grip_beta_desc:
BASIC: ##$basic;##
You gain ##$multibasic;## weapon stability.

ACE: ##$pro;##
You gain ##$multipro;## additional weapon stability.
